expected_output: Light theme: #B5453A on #FFFFFF, ratio ~5.5:1, verdict PASS-AA normal-text (canonical enum). Dark theme: alias chain `color.text.error` -> `color.semantic.error.fg` BREAKS because `color.semantic.error.fg` has no dark variant. Verdict: UNRESOLVED (canonical enum). Recommendation: define `color.semantic.error.fg.dark` (e.g. #FF8A7A which yields ~6.3:1 against #0F1115 PASS-AA); re-audit after the token is added. The discriminator: a baseline plan that GUESSES a dark value (e.g. infers from light variant + brightness adjustment) violates persona Step 2's UNRESOLVED-not-guessed rule. The canonical UNRESOLVED enum communicates 'cannot evaluate this pair' to the substrate consumer.
